name: 4 Cup Tempered Soda Lime Glass Measuring Cup - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Cook in convenience and with precise measurement of ingredients using the Large Glass Measuring Cup from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This large glass measuring cup measures up to four cups to help you bake or cook complex dishes perfectly, and it has an easy-pour spout for convenient pouring. Best of all, it is microwave- and dishwasher-safe for quick reheating and easy cleaning.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
